section: The Advantages of Going Custom in BFSI
text: Custom financial software is built around your business — not built to compromise it. Instead of bending your processes to fit a tool, custom development ensures the software supports your exact operations, goals, and compliance needs. That means faster adoption, greater efficiency, and long-term value. 5 Advantages of Going Custom in BFSI Here’s what custom brings to the table: Precision Fit: Solutions built around your exact business logic, workflows, and regulatory obligations — not generic use cases. Compliance by Design: Regulatory requirements are embedded into the system architecture from day one, not retrofitted after. Security at Every Layer: We engineer robust, enterprise-grade security into every component — from encryption to access controls. Seamless Integration: Custom APIs and modular design ensure smooth connection with both legacy infrastructure and modern toolchains. Operational Resilience: At BGTS, resilience is a core outcome. We design systems to handle high loads, minimise downtime, and adapt as your organisation evolves — even under regulatory pressure or market volatility. Custom isn’t about complexity — it’s about building smarter, leaner, and more resilient financial software that fits the way you work.

section: Turning Workforce Data into Financial Foresight
text: Finance and HR teams at an enterprise client lacked a cohesive tool to translate headcount data into accurate, scenario-based budget forecasts. Existing solutions couldn’t handle dynamic planning needs or link financial assumptions to real workforce structures. We built a custom budget planning module that connected organisational data with financial models — giving leaders the ability to simulate costs, adjust in real time, and plan with clarity and control.

section: Unifying Field Sales & Customer Ops with a Mobile-First Strategy
text: A leading BFSI organisation was struggling with fragmented sales processes and limited visibility into customer interactions. Manual workflows and disconnected systems slowed down field execution and increased risk. We delivered a mobile application that unified customer management and sales enablement in one secure, intuitive platform — enabling faster decisions, real-time updates, and stronger alignment between teams in the field and back office. Each BGTS solution reflects our core strength: bridging complex financial needs with custom software designed for performance, compliance, and resilience.

section: Why Off-the-Shelf Software Falls Short in Finance
text: In financial services, complexity is the norm — not the exception. Off-the-shelf solutions are built for broad use, which means they often lack the flexibility, security, and precision that financial institutions require. Here’s where they fall short: 4 Reasons Why Off-the-Shelf Software Falls Short in Finance Limited Fit for Business Logic – Pre-packaged tools rarely align with unique internal processes, forcing teams to adapt workflows around the software instead of the other way around. Poor Integration with Legacy Systems – Many financial organisations still rely on legacy infrastructure. Off-the-shelf software often struggles to integrate smoothly, creating data silos and operational friction. Inflexible Compliance Capabilities – Regulations vary across regions, products, and services. Standard software rarely allows the level of control and traceability needed to stay fully compliant. Excess Bloat, Missing Essentials – These platforms often come overloaded with irrelevant features while lacking critical ones that matter to your teams and stakeholders. The result? Teams spend more time fixing the software than using it — leading to inefficiency, risk, and lost competitive advantage.

text: 6 Essential ITSM Practices Service Request Management – Processing everyday user requests, including login resets and app access. Knowledge Management – Capturing and sharing information to enhance efficiency. IT Asset Management – Monitoring and controlling hardware and software throughout their lifecycle. Incident Management – Responding to service interruptions to ensure timely restoration of operations. Problem Management – Finding and addressing root causes to stop issues from recurring.. Change Management – Managing updates and changes with minimal risk. ITSM aims to align technology services with organisational goals, enhancing both service delivery and operational performance.

section: Service Desk vs. Help Desk: What’s the Difference?
text: The key differences between a help desk and a service desk lie in their origins, scope, approach, and capabilities. Help desks emerged from the traditional break/fix support model, focusing primarily on resolving technical issues as they arise. In contrast, service desks evolved from ITSM principles, offering a broader, more structured approach to IT support. While help desks tend to be tactical and limited in scope—mainly addressing incident resolution—service desks take a strategic view, managing a wide range of IT services. They typically include advanced capabilities such as change management and asset tracking, which are often absent in basic help desk setups. From a user experience perspective, service desks are designed to enhance overall service delivery through features like self-service portals and automation, making support more proactive and efficient.

text: Cultural and linguistic similarities in nearshore regions reduce friction in day-to-day collaboration. This is especially critical for complex IT projects, custom software development, where clarity and shared understanding are essential. Nearshore teams are also more familiar with European business practices and workplace expectations, making it easier to align workflows, maintain productivity, and avoid costly miscommunication.
page_title: 7 Strategic Benefits of Nearshoring for Your Business
meta_description: Discover the top 7 benefits of nearshoring for enterprises. Learn how BGTS helps reduce costs, ensure compliance, and accelerate technology delivery

text: For European businesses, nearshoring within the EU ensures that your teams and partners operate under the same regulatory frameworks. This alignment simplifies compliance with strict standards such as GDPR: data remains within the EU, avoiding risky cross-border transfers, while financial institutions can rely on service providers already subject to EU supervisory oversight. The result is reduced legal risk, smoother audits, and greater peace of mind.
page_title: 7 Strategic Benefits of Nearshoring for Your Business
meta_description: Discover the top 7 benefits of nearshoring for enterprises. Learn how BGTS helps reduce costs, ensure compliance, and accelerate technology delivery

text: Nearshoring makes it easier to scale teams up or down as business needs change. The geographical and regulatory closeness means onboarding is faster, contractual adjustments are simpler, and project pivots are less disruptive. Whether you need to expand development capacity for a major rollout or streamline during quieter periods, nearshore partnerships give you the agility to respond without overextending resources.
page_title: 7 Strategic Benefits of Nearshoring for Your Business
meta_description: Discover the top 7 benefits of nearshoring for enterprises. Learn how BGTS helps reduce costs, ensure compliance, and accelerate technology delivery

text: By combining cost efficiency, regulatory ease, skilled talent, and time zone alignment, nearshoring shortens the overall time-to-market for new products and services. Teams can collaborate in real time, regulatory bottlenecks are reduced, and delivery cycles are streamlined. For organisations competing in fast-moving sectors, this speed is often the difference between leading the market and playing catch-up.

section: Unlock the Full Potential of Nearshoring
text: Nearshoring has become more than a cost-saving tactic—it is a strategic enabler for innovation, compliance, and speed. By choosing the right nearshore partner, enterprises can accelerate delivery, reduce risk, and strengthen their technology foundations for long-term growth. If your organisation is exploring nearshoring as a strategy, BGTS can help you unlock its full potential. 👉 Let’s talk about how nearshoring can accelerate your next project.
page_title: 7 Strategic Benefits of Nearshoring for Your Business
meta_description: Discover the top 7 benefits of nearshoring for enterprises. Learn how BGTS helps reduce costs, ensure compliance, and accelerate technology delivery

text: Nearshoring delivers significant advantages—but real success depends on the partner you work with. At BGTS, our Nearshore development and IT services combine nearshore efficiency with enterprise-grade expertise to deliver measurable result. Benefits of Working with BGTS in Nearshore Development Faster time-to-hire: We provide tech talent in just 4 weeks, faster than the UK average of 5.5 weeks. Extensive talent pool: Your organisation gains access to highly qualified professionals, with a strong proportion of senior-level expertise. Broad skillset: At BGTS, we bring multi-disciplinary capabilities spanning ITSM, ITOM, DevOps, custom development, and more. Dedicated account management: Your organisation benefits from a single point of contact for clear and responsive communication. Flexible engagement models: We adapt to your needs with Team as a Service, Time & Material, turnkey, or blended delivery. WiseShore model: Your organisation can choose nearshore, onshore, or offshore to balance cost, performance, and proximity. Competitive rates: At BGTS, our services are up to 25% more cost-effective than UK market averages. Reduced operational load: Your organisation reduces HR and management overhead, supported by 90+ talent specialists.

text: For enterprises that need long-term stability, Dedicated Teams provide cross-functional experts who integrate fully into your organisation. Unlike traditional staff augmentation, where individuals are contracted in isolation, BGTS assembles cohesive teams with domain knowledge and experience. They operate as an extension of your internal workforce—adopting your tools, processes, and culture—while ensuring continuity across projects. This model is ideal when you want to accelerate product development, scale existing platforms, or maintain consistent delivery capacity without the overhead of permanent hiring.

text: While TaaS focuses on scalable teams, many enterprises need partners who can take full accountability for projects from start to finish. That’s where our Full Lifecycle Software Delivery models come in. Turnkey Projects – Designed for predictability. BGTS takes full responsibility for execution, managing fixed-scope projects with clear timelines and defined budgets. Enterprises gain certainty in both delivery and cost. Time & Material (T&M) – Built for flexibility. Ideal for evolving requirements, this model supports iterative development, agile environments, and projects that need to adapt quickly to change. Time & Material Plus (TMP) – Ideal for dynamic projects, TMP allows scope evolution and enhancements through mutual agreement, combining the agility of T&M with the accountability of fixed-price models. Both approaches ensure enterprises benefit from nearshore efficiency, while also receiving the structure, governance, and quality assurance required at enterprise scale.

section: WiseShore – Balancing Cost, Performance, and Proximity
text: No two projects are the same. Some require close collaboration within the same time zone, while others can be delivered more cost-effectively offshore. BGTS’s WiseShore model provides the flexibility to blend nearshore, onshore, and offshore resources in a way that balances cost, performance, and compliance. This hybrid approach ensures that enterprises can adjust their delivery strategy as priorities evolve—without sacrificing governance or quality.

text: Signed on behalf of the Supplier: Suman Alamsetti Director Date: 01 January 2025

Baseline emissions are a record of the greenhouse gases that have been produced in the past and were produced prior to the introduction of any strategies to reduce emissions. Baseline emissions are the reference point against which emissions reduction can be measured. This is for the baseline reporting period of 1 January 2024 to 31 December 2025.

We are committed to reducing our carbon footprint and achieving Net Zero emissions by 2050. As a responsible business, we recognise the importance of sustainability and environmental stewardship in all aspects of our operations.

Progress against our emissions reduction targets.

Timeline Targets Short-term (2025–2027) 30% reduction in total emissions 40% reduction in business travel emissions 100% renewable electricity Medium-term (2028–2035) 60% total emission reduction 100% electric fleet 50% reduction in employee commuting Long-term (by 2050) Net Zero across all scopes

Our Scope 1 emissions total 0.00 tCO₂e for the 2024 reporting period. This reflects our operational model where we primarily operate from serviced office spaces and have transitioned our fleet to electric vehicles. Our service-based business model inherently results in lower direct emissions compared to manufacturing or industrial organisations.

Our Scope 2 emissions total 3.25 tCO₂e , representing 19.2% of our total carbon footprint. While we do not have access to detailed electricity consumption data due to our serviced office arrangements, we have developed robust estimates based on industry benchmarks and operational data. Office electricity consumption has been estimated at 2.17 tCO₂e based on typical UK office energy consumption patterns. With three employees working from our office facilities, we have applied an industry-standard benchmark of 3,500 kWh per employee per year, totalling 10,500 kWh annually. Electric vehicle charging represents 1.07 tCO₂e of our Scope 2 emissions. Based on operational data for our Tesla vehicle, which travels 28,800 kilometres annually, we have estimated electricity consumption using typical Tesla efficiency of 0.18 kWh per kilometre.

Our total Scope 3 emissions for 2024 are 13.69 tCO₂e , representing 80.8% of our total organisational emissions. Business travel is the largest source at 8.15 tCO₂e , primarily from international flights. Land-based travel and employee commuting are also significant contributors.

text: If you have any questions about this Cookie Policy or wish to exercise your rights, please contact us at info-uk@bgts.com with the subject line “Cookie Policy Request.” Effective Date : January 7, 2025 We gather various types of Personal Information from our users, as explained more fully below. We may use this Personal Information to personalize and improve our services, to allow our users to set up a user account and profile, to contact users, to fulfill your requests for certain products and services, to analyze how users utilize the Website, and as otherwise set forth in this Privacy Policy. We collect the following types of information: (a) Information You Provide to Us: We receive and store any information you knowingly provide to us. For example, we may collect Personal Information including but not limited to your name, email address, location, IP address, and other browser cookie information. We may collect other Personal Information you provide us through your use of our services. (b) Information Collected Automatically: When you visit our website, log in, register, or open an email, cookies, ad beacons, and similar technologies may be used by our online data partners or vendors to associate these activities with information they or others have about you, including your email address and other personal information. We (or service providers on our behalf) may then send communications and marketing to these email addresses. You may opt out of receiving this advertising by visiting {insert your website domain} and clicking on the opt-out links in the footer of the website. “Cookies” are identifiers we transfer to your computer through your browser that allow us to recognize your browser, and also tell us how and when pages in our site are visited, and by how many people. You may be able to change the preferences on your browser to prevent or limit your computer’s acceptance of cookies, but this may prevent you from taking advantage of the best features of our Website. Our advertising partners may also transmit cookies to your computer when you click on content and ads that appear on our site. This Privacy Policy does not cover the use of cookies by any third-party advertisers. (c) E-mail and Other Communications: We may contact you by email or other means; for example, we may send you promotional offers on behalf of our business or other businesses, or communicate with you about your use of the Website. Also, we may receive a confirmation notice when you open an email from us. This confirmation helps us make emails more interesting and improve our service. (d) Additional Information: We may collect and store information that your computer or mobile device provides to us in connection with your use of the Website, such as the type of computer or mobile device, unique device ID, the advertiser ID of the device, IP address, MAC address, the operating system of the device, and the physical location of the device (including geographic, beacon based, and/or GPS location). (e) Opting Out If you would like to opt-out of (b) Information Collected Automatically, visit https://getuntitled.ai/do-not-sell-my-info Additionally, you can opt out of some of these services by visiting the Digital Advertising Alliance’s opt-out portal at: http://optout.aboutads.info/. If you are a European resident, you have the right to access personal information we hold about you and to ask that your personal information be corrected, updated, or deleted. If you would like to exercise this right, please contact us through the contact information below. Additionally, if you are a European resident we note that we are processing your information in order to fulfill contracts we might have with you (for example if you make an order through the Site), or otherwise to pursue our legitimate business interests listed above. Additionally, please note that your information will be transferred outside of Europe, including to Canada and the United States.

text: For questions or concerns about this Privacy Policy, please contact us at info-uk@bgts.com with the subject line “Privacy Policy Inquiry.” Effective Date : January 7, 2025 We gather various types of Personal Information from our users, as explained more fully below. We may use this Personal Information to personalize and improve our services, to allow our users to set up a user account and profile, to contact users, to fulfill your requests for certain products and services, to analyze how users utilize the Website, and as otherwise set forth in this Privacy Policy. We collect the following types of information: (a) Information You Provide to Us: We receive and store any information you knowingly provide to us. For example, we may collect Personal Information including but not limited to your name, email address, location, IP address, and other browser cookie information. We may collect other Personal Information you provide us through your use of our services. (b) Information Collected Automatically: When you visit our website, log in, register, or open an email, cookies, ad beacons, and similar technologies may be used by our online data partners or vendors to associate these activities with information they or others have about you, including your email address and other personal information. We (or service providers on our behalf) may then send communications and marketing to these email addresses. You may opt out of receiving this advertising by visiting {insert your website domain} and clicking on the opt-out links in the footer of the website. “Cookies” are identifiers we transfer to your computer through your browser that allow us to recognize your browser, and also tell us how and when pages in our site are visited, and by how many people. You may be able to change the preferences on your browser to prevent or limit your computer’s acceptance of cookies, but this may prevent you from taking advantage of the best features of our Website. Our advertising partners may also transmit cookies to your computer when you click on content and ads that appear on our site. This Privacy Policy does not cover the use of cookies by any third-party advertisers. (c) E-mail and Other Communications: We may contact you by email or other means; for example, we may send you promotional offers on behalf of our business or other businesses, or communicate with you about your use of the Website. Also, we may receive a confirmation notice when you open an email from us. This confirmation helps us make emails more interesting and improve our service. (d) Additional Information: We may collect and store information that your computer or mobile device provides to us in connection with your use of the Website, such as the type of computer or mobile device, unique device ID, the advertiser ID of the device, IP address, MAC address, the operating system of the device, and the physical location of the device (including geographic, beacon based, and/or GPS location). (e) Opting Out If you would like to opt-out of (b) Information Collected Automatically, visit https://getuntitled.ai/do-not-sell-my-info Additionally, you can opt out of some of these services by visiting the Digital Advertising Alliance’s opt-out portal at: http://optout.aboutads.info/. If you are a European resident, you have the right to access personal information we hold about you and to ask that your personal information be corrected, updated, or deleted. If you would like to exercise this right, please contact us through the contact information below. Additionally, if you are a European resident we note that we are processing your information in order to fulfill contracts we might have with you (for example if you make an order through the Site), or otherwise to pursue our legitimate business interests listed above. Additionally, please note that your information will be transferred outside of Europe, including to Canada and the United States.

text: BGTS, bulut tabanlı yazılım geliştirme ve entegrasyon hizmetleriyle kurumunuzun performansını ve ölçeklenebilirliğini artırmasına yardımcı olur. Bulut yerel uygulamalar, eski sistemlerin modernize edilmesi ve maliyet etkin bulut geçişi gibi çözümler sunarak, kurumların rekabetçi kalmasını sağlıyoruz.

BGTS’in büyük veri ve analitik çözümleri, gerçek zamanlı analiz, tahmine dayalı içgörüler ve veri mühendisliği yetkinlikleriyle ham veriyi anlamlı stratejilere dönüştürmenizi sağlar. Hadoop ve Spark gibi güçlü platformlarla büyük ölçekli verileri etkili bir şekilde işleyebilir, saklayabilir ve analiz edebilirsiniz.
Özel Yazılım Geliştirme Yazılım Test ve Kalite Mühendisliği Yapay Zeka Bulut Büyük Veri ve Analitik
1.100’den fazla başarılı proje ve onlarca yıllık sektör deneyimi
Uç Nokta Yönetimi Bulut ve Veri Merkezi Operasyonları DevOps NOC İzleme Son Kullanıcı Desteği

Social Media Links:
Linkedin: https://linkedin.com/company/bgts
Yapay zeka, büyük veri, bulut ve mühendislik çözümlerinde en ileri teknolojiler
Dijital Strateji Teknoloji Yol Haritası Çevik Projeler

Yapay zekanın dönüştürücü gücünü kullanarak, kurumunuzu ileriye taşıyoruz. Karar destek sistemleri, tahmine dayalı bakım ve doğal dil işleme (NLP) çözümlerimiz, kurumların veriye dayalı içgörüler elde etmesine, müşteri etkileşimlerini kişiselleştirmesine ve akıllı otomasyonlar kurgulamasına yardımcı olur.

BGTS’in yazılım test ve kalite çözümleri, yazılımınızın performans, güvenilirlik ve güvenlik açısından en yüksek standartları karşılamasını garanti eder. Fonksiyonel ve fonksiyonel olmayan testlerden, test otomasyonuna ve ortam yönetimine kadar kapsamlı çözümler sunarak, geliştirme süreçlerini optimize ediyoruz.
Kurumunuzun büyümesine uyum sağlayan, uzun vadeli çözümler

Kurumunuzun ekosistemine kusursuz bir şekilde entegre olan, güçlü ve ölçeklenebilir uygulamalar geliştiriyoruz. Özel yazılım çözümlerimiz; süreçleri kolaylaştırır, müşteri deneyimlerini iyileştirir ve operasyonel verimliliği artırır. Web, mobil ve kurumsal uygulamalar konusundaki uzmanlığımızla, iş hedeflerinize ulaşmanızı sağlıyoruz.
Kurumunuzun özel ihtiyaçlarına uygun, hedef odaklı yaklaşım
Çoklu bulut yönetimi ve Cloud-Native uygulamalar.
Mevcut bulut altyapınızı analiz ederek kullanılmayan kaynakları belirliyor ve maliyetleri optimize ediyoruz.
GDPR, ISO 27001, HIPAA gibi küresel güvenlik standartlarına uyumlu çözümler. Veri şifreleme ve güvenli geçiş süreçleri ile maksimum güvenlik.
Gerçek zamanlı performans izleme ile sistemlerinizi sürekli optimize ediyoruz. Ölçeklenebilir altyapı sayesinde talebe göre genişleyebilen sistemler oluşturuyoruz.
Mevcut uygulamalarınızı mikro hizmet mimarisi ile daha esnek ve ölçeklenebilir hale getiriyoruz.
AWS Lambda, Azure Functions gibi sunucusuz teknolojiler ve ileri düzey veritabanı servisleri ile modern çözümler sunuyoruz.
İşletmenizin özel gereksinimlerine uygun IaaS, PaaS ve SaaS modelleriyle sorunsuz bir bulut geçişi sağlıyoruz.

Geçiş Planlaması: Mevcut BT altyapınızı analiz ederek özel bir geçiş stratejisi oluşturuyoruz. Bulut Yerel Geliştirme: En son teknolojilerle güçlü, ölçeklenebilir uygulamalar geliştiriyoruz. Entegrasyon Hizmetleri: Mevcut sistemlerinizi modern bulut ortamlarına entegre ediyoruz.

Dijital Strateji Teknoloji Yol Haritası Çevik Projeler
Müşteri kaybı tahmini, ağ optimizasyonu ve hizmet iyileştirme çözümleri sağlıyoruz.
BGTS olarak, kanıtlanmış bir büyük veri analitiği süreci uygulayarak projelerinizi başarıya ulaştırıyoruz:
Gelişmiş şifreleme teknikleri ve güvenli yedekleme çözümleri ile verilerinizin gizliliğini ve bütünlüğünü koruyoruz.

ETL/ELT süreçleriyle verilerinizi sorunsuz bir şekilde entegre edip, dönüştürüyor ve depoluyoruz.
Güçlü veri hatları tasarlayarak analitik doğruluğunu ve işlem verimliliğini artırıyoruz.

Müşteri davranışlarını analiz ederek yeni gelir fırsatları yaratmanızı sağlıyoruz.
Hizmetlerinizi iyileştirmenize ve yeni pazar fırsatlarını keşfetmenize yardımcı oluyoruz.

Makine öğrenimi ve yapay zeka algoritmaları ile pazar eğilimlerini önceden tahmin etmenize yardımcı oluyoruz.
İş süreçlerini optimize etmek ve karar alma mekanizmalarını geliştirmek için gelişmiş veri modelleme teknikleri kullanıyoruz.
Tedarik zinciri yönetimi ve üretim optimizasyonu için veri odaklı çözümler geliştiriyoruz.
Gerçek zamanlı gösterge panelleri ve görselleştirilmiş raporlarla iş performansınızı her açıdan analiz etmenizi sağlıyoruz.

Bulut tabanlı dijital dönüşüm çözümleriyle kurumlara esneklik kazandırıyoruz. Veri odaklı stratejiler ile ürün geliştirme süreçlerini optimize ediyoruz. IT altyapısını modernleştirerek dijital araçlar ve otomasyon çözümleri sunuyoruz.
Bulut çözümleri ile esneklik, ölçeklenebilirlik ve maliyet verimliliği sağlıyoruz. Özel, genel ve hibrit bulut stratejileri ile kurumunuzun dijital dönüşüm sürecini destekliyoruz.

Kurumunuzun dijitalleşme sürecini hızlandırarak verimlilik, kârlılık ve müşteri memnuniyetini artırıyoruz. Gelişmiş teknoloji entegrasyonu, süreç optimizasyonu ve inovasyon odaklı çözümler ile kurumunuzun dijital geleceğini şekillendiriyoruz.
Özel Yazılım Geliştirme Yazılım Test ve Kalite Mühendisliği Yapay Zeka Bulut Büyük Veri ve Analitik

Dijital ticaretinizi büyütmek için veri odaklı pazar analizleri, kullanıcı deneyimi optimizasyonu ve satış stratejileri geliştiriyoruz. Dijital ekosisteminizin verimli çalışmasını sağlayarak iş büyümesini hızlandırıyoruz.
Güvenli dijital bankacılık platformları oluşturarak müşteri deneyimini güçlendiriyoruz. Veriye dayalı kredi risk değerlendirme ve dolandırıcılık önleme çözümleri sunuyoruz.
Uç Nokta Yönetimi Bulut ve Veri Merkezi Operasyonları DevOps NOC İzleme Son Kullanıcı Desteği

İçerik dağıtım platformları oluşturarak izleyici etkileşimini artırıyoruz. Veri analitiği ile hedef kitleye özel içerik sunumları sağlıyoruz. Gelir artırıcı yeni dijital gelir modelleri geliştiriyoruz.

Müşteri beklentilerini analiz ederek, kişiselleştirilmiş dijital deneyimler oluşturuyoruz. Kurumunuzun müşteri sadakati ve etkileşimini artırmasını sağlayacak yenilikçi dijital çözümler geliştiriyoruz.

Bağlantılı araç ekosistemleri kurarak IoT ve bulut teknolojilerini entegre ediyoruz. Müşteri deneyimini kişiselleştiren veri odaklı platformlar tasarlıyoruz. Dijital ikizler ve tahmine dayalı analizlerle operasyonel verimliliği artırıyoruz.

Omnichannel (çok kanallı) platformlar ile müşterilere kesintisiz alışveriş deneyimi sunuyoruz. Veri analizleri ile müşteri davranışlarını anlamlandırıp, kişiselleştirilmiş öneriler sağlıyoruz. Büyüyen pazar ihtiyaçlarına uyum sağlayan e-ticaret çözümleri geliştiriyoruz.

Dijital Strateji Teknoloji Yol Haritası Çevik Projeler

AI destekli analiz ve karar mekanizmaları ile müşteri kaybını azaltıyoruz. Bulut tabanlı faturalama ve müşteri destek platformları geliştiriyoruz. Ağ optimizasyonu ve ölçeklenebilir yönetim çözümleri sağlıyoruz.

Kurumunuzun veriye dayalı karar alma süreçlerini geliştirerek, rekabet avantajı elde etmenize yardımcı oluyoruz. Gerçek zamanlı veri analizi, yapay zeka destekli içgörüler ve iş zekası çözümleri ile stratejik kararları güçlendiriyoruz.

Üretim süreçlerini dijitalleştirerek daha verimli operasyonlar oluşturuyoruz. Gerçek zamanlı izleme ve optimizasyon sağlayan IoT çözümleri geliştiriyoruz. Tedarik zinciri yönetiminde veri entegrasyonu ile şeffaflık ve verimlilik sağlıyoruz.

İçerik yönetimi, telif hakları takibi ve izleyici etkileşimi sağlayan uygulamalar.

Dijital Strateji Teknoloji Yol Haritası Çevik Projeler
Bağlantı ve müşteri deneyimini geliştiren ileri teknoloji çözümleri.

Kurumunuzun özel gereksinimlerine uygun, yüksek özelleştirme imkanı sunan ve ölçeklenebilir web uygulamaları geliştiriyoruz. Güçlü mimari ve en son teknolojilerle tasarladığımız çözümler, sorunsuz işleyiş, yüksek performans ve kullanıcı etkileşimini artırmaya odaklanıyor.
Güvenilir ve etkili çözümler sunan sektör tecrübesi.
Üretim ve lojistik süreçlerini optimize eden otomasyon sistemleri.

İş süreçlerinizi optimize etmek için benzersiz zorluklarınızı analiz eder ve esnek, ihtiyaca özel çözümler sunarız. Sürekli iş birliği ve iteratif geliştirme süreçleriyle iş akışlarınızı stratejik hedeflerinizle uyumlu hale getiririz. Çevik proje yönetim yaklaşımımız sayesinde değişimlere hızlı uyum sağlarken, zamanında teslimat ve sürekli iyileştirme ile kurumunuzun çevik kalmasını, maliyetlerin düşmesini ve sürdürülebilir büyüme elde etmesini sağlıyoruz.
Yapay zeka tabanlı siber güvenlik çözümlerimiz, gerçek zamanlı veri analizi ile potansiyel tehditleri tespit edip ortadan kaldırarak işletmenizi daha güvenli hale getirir.
Yapay zeka teknolojisini karar destek sistemlerinize entegre ederek operasyonlar, satış, pazarlama ve tedarik zinciri yönetimi süreçlerinde gerçek zamanlı, veri odaklı içgörüler sağlıyoruz.
Tıbbi cihazlardan otonom araçlara ve akıllı şehir çözümlerine kadar geniş bir yelpazede uç bilişim için tasarlanmış yapay zeka çözümleri sunuyoruz.
AI destekli siber güvenlik çözümleri ve yazılım yönetimi.
Bilgisayarlı görü teknolojilerimiz sayesinde gerçek zamanlı nesne tanıma ve çok çeşitli uygulamalar için multimedya analizi sağlıyoruz.

AI destekli dolandırıcılık tespiti ve kredi risk analizi.

Akıllı robot yazılımlarımız, tekrarlayan ve zaman alan görevleri otomatikleştirerek hata oranlarını düşürür ve doğruluğu artırır.
Gerçek zamanlı sensör verilerini analiz ederek iş süreçlerini optimize etmek ve operasyonel verimliliği artırmak için güçlü içgörüler sağlıyoruz.
